items.briefing:
Australian organisations using AI tools — particularly within business systems like ERP platforms — are being reminded to understand where their data goes when AI processes it. This is especially relevant as new AI-powered cyber tools from providers like OpenText are being marketed to local firms. Separately, the latest Verizon Data Breach Investigations Report highlights that organisations are struggling with a growing backlog of unpatched vulnerabilities, which remains one of the leading causes of breaches globally, including here in Australia.

If your organisation is adopting AI tools, ask your vendor directly whether your business data is used to train their AI models — and get that answer in writing.

featured.title: Using AI in your ERP? You should know where your data goes
featured.quote: ERP AI queries crossing borders poses critical data sovereignty risks for Australian finance teams.
